intent: High-throughput operational UI optimized for scanning, comparison, and repeated action.
layoutRules: Prioritize tables, filters, sidebars, and persistent toolbars over large visual sections.
Keep common actions one click away.
Avoid whitespace that separates related operational controls.

buttons: Text buttons for destructive or uncommon actions
forms: Inline help only where it prevents errors
navigation: Left sidebar or split-pane preferred for multi-workflow apps
modals: Use for focused confirmation or creation only
charts: Small multiples and compact legends preferred
states: Loading states should preserve layout dimensions

interactionRules: Hover actions must not cause layout shift.
Keyboard workflows should remain fast for repeated tasks.
accessibilityRules: Touch targets can be compact on desktop but must be usable.
imagePromptStyle: A dense operational SaaS interface, compact tables, filters, sidebar navigation, efficient toolbar, neutral light palette, high readability, no marketing hero, no decorative illustration.
